title: Tritium
description: Adds set of tools and a totem , excluding armour
body:
As the Summary says adds only those which its Post Netherite\
Post means that its after netherite, requires netherite tools to make tritium tools.

- Require Ancient Technology -> https://modrinth.com/mod/ancienttechnology Preferably Latest

And also it required the `Ancient Technology` its because needed to make from Hanordix Ingot to Tritium Scrap

This mod is also made in Mcreator since i im lazy.\
If you want to contact me on discord my name is > NGeorge#5042

The souce code is no longer available BUT you can still decompile the jar file since the JAR is deobfuscated.
